iterations.feature: baseline instrument panel (ring + stats + iteration log)
interactive ring — click a segment for that iteration's story card
iterations.broke: ring arcs invisible to the testing agent — svg role=img flattened the a11y tree, segments not focusable
iterations.fixed: real accessible controls: tabIndex=0, Enter/Space handler, role=img removed

iterations.feature: motion tokens + GSAP ring draw-on intro
iterations.broke: over-strict test assertion: orbit dot must visibly move — flaky under reduced-motion cloud browsers
iterations.fixed: plan refined to settled end-state assertions (L2); app unchanged

iterations.feature: flight-recorder replay — scrub and replay the loop's own history
learning curve — stacked run bars + cumulative lessons step-line
iterations.broke: checker returned status 'blocked' while its own conclusion said PASS with all steps green
iterations.fixed: verdict recorded from the evidence; platform discrepancy reported upstream

iterations.feature: harness cycle diagram — WRITE→VERIFY→BANK with the fail→LESSON loop
iterations.broke: 11px 'pass' connector label unreadable in the tester's screenshots
iterations.fixed: labels raised to 13.5px weight-500 (L4); rerun verified the label

iterations.feature: checker evidence inside story cards — failure-bundle excerpts
iterations.broke: tester clicked the replay diamond ('Seek to iteration 2') instead of the ring arc — look-alike controls
iterations.fixed: accessible names diverged + plan names the widget type (L5); rerun 17/17
